home.selectIdentityDesc: Please select the user type that best fits your needs so we can provide you with a personalized service experience
home.assetPartyDesc: Individual or corporate real estate holders who upload asset information and put assets on the blockchain
home.evaluatorDesc: Evaluation companies responsible for verifying asset information
home.lawOfficeDesc: Professional institutions providing legal services, compliance review, and legal opinions

chainProcess.title: RWA On-Chain Standard Process
chainProcess.descriptionDesktop: Six-step process, grand, minimalist, and stable, directly representing platform capabilities
chainProcess.descriptionMobile: This module directly represents platform capabilities, showing the complete process from asset submission to investment distribution

steps.title: Asset Party Submits Property Information
steps.desc: Property certificates, contracts, and valuation materials uploaded with one click

steps.title: Lawyer Preliminary Review
steps.desc: Lawyers verify the legality and authenticity of property documents

steps.title: Evaluator Review
steps.desc: Third-party evaluation agencies review valuations, rents, and risk ratings

steps.title: Offline Lawyer Confirmation
steps.desc: Legal confirmation of asset ownership, generating confirmation documents

steps.title: Node On-Chain
steps.desc: Node operators execute final on-chain registration, generate asset on-chain hash, and mint corresponding HRWA Token

steps.title: Investment Subscription and Distribution
steps.desc: Investors can purchase Tokens in the system, and rental income is automatically distributed on-chain

chainTransparency.title: Asset On-Chain Transparency
chainTransparency.description: Providing full-process transparency for asset on-chain capabilities for the investment side

features.title: On-Chain Hash & Verifiable Confirmation Documents
features.content: Each asset generates a unique hash value after being put on-chain, and all confirmation documents can be verified at any time to ensure asset authenticity.

features.title: Every Process Step Has Timestamps
features.content: Every operation from submission to on-chain recording is timestamped, forming a complete and traceable operational history.

features.title: Transparent Income Distribution and Transaction Records
features.content: On-chain transparency of income distribution, holdings, and transaction records for all assets, allowing investors to check asset status and income at any time.

assetShowcase.title: On-Chain Asset Display (Example)
assetShowcase.description: Transparent display of on-chain asset information

propertyInfo.name: No. 1 Century Avenue, Pudong New District, Shanghai

mobileInfo.nameValue: Binjiang No. 1 Apartment, Pudong New District, Shanghai

contentEnd.title1: Ready to bring assets into the
contentEnd.description: Join us to experience safe, transparent, and efficient RWA asset on-chain services, and embark on a new journey of real estate digitalization.

values.title: Full Process Online
values.description: From offline to on-chain, achieving full lifecycle management of assets

values.title: Compliant and Trustworthy
values.description1: From offline to on-chain, achieving full lifecycle management of assets
values.description2: Every review step has professional institutions, on-chain records, and immutable hashes.

values.title: Compliant and Trustworthy
values.description: Full automation management of subscription and distribution processes
values.description2: On-chain recording of asset income, automatically distributed to Token holders.

homeContent.description1: Let every property have a credible identity on-chain
homeContent.description2: From asset upload, legal review, evaluation confirmation to node on-chain, investor subscription and distribution,
homeContent.description3: The entire RWA process is completed in one platform.

platformAdvantages.title: Platform Advantages
platformAdvantages.description: Three core advantages reflecting the platform's subjective value

advantages.title: Safe and Compliant System
advantages.content: Dual review mechanism of lawyers + nodes to ensure that every asset on-chain complies with legal requirements and asset security.

advantages.title: Cross-Organization Collaborative SaaS
advantages.content: Connecting multiple parties such as lawyers, evaluation agencies, and node operators to achieve efficient cross-organization collaboration and accelerate the asset on-chain process.

advantages.title: Automated Token Circulation and Distribution
advantages.content: Smart contracts automatically execute asset income distribution, investors do not need manual operations, achieving automated passive income management.

platformRole.title: Platform Roles
platformRole.description: Five core roles highlighting the SaaS multi-role ecosystem

success.title: Submission Successful
success.description: Your asset information has been successfully submitted. We will complete the review within 1-3 business days. The review results will be notified to you through system notifications and email.

info.filePreviewTip: Click the file name to preview the original file, and click "View Details" to see the specific error location.

payRent.title: Pay Rent
payRent.paymentInstruction: Please use your cryptocurrency wallet or copy the address to make the transfer.

defaultDetails.title: Default Details
defaultDetails.contactTenant: Contact the tenant immediately for a final discussion and request full payment within 48 hours.
defaultDetails.prepareLegalAction: If payment is not received, prepare to initiate legal action to recover the debt.
defaultDetails.considerTermination: Based on the contract terms, consider terminating the lease and requesting the tenant to vacate.
defaultDetails.evaluateRental: Evaluate the possibility of re-renting and the estimated vacancy period.

offlineExecution.offlineRemarksPlaceholder: Example: 10:12 Get queue number, 11:05 Submit materials, 12:30 Receipt number PD2025-001-889; Window suggests picking up documents on 11/03 at 15:00.

offlineExecution.declarationText: I have completed the offline mortgage/transfer processing this time, and the uploaded materials are true and valid for audit verification. If false, I am willing to bear the corresponding legal responsibility.

layoutFooter.platformDescription1: Bringing real-world assets securely and transparently on-chain, providing credible on-chain identities for property assets.
layoutFooter.platformDescription2: We are committed to building a safe, transparent, and efficient real estate on-chain platform, enabling real-world assets to easily enter the blockchain world and achieve asset digitization and value circulation.
